title: Ores Drop OP Loot
description: Ores drop progressively more OP loot.
body:
## Summary
**Ores drop progressively more OP loot**, starting from copper & coal all the way to ancient debris.

I could not find a datapack like this for 1.21.11, and rather than sulk in my misery, I decided to make one myself. Following [Awhikax's OP Ores](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/op-ores/) datapack for 1.17, I wanted an updated version containing the items from newer Minecraft releases.

## Info

- **deepslate** and **non-deepslate** ore variants contain the same loot
- fortune enchantment adds +1 loot table roll for every level
- Check gallery for examples of different ore drops.

<details>
<summary>Unimportant Info</summary>

This datapack was made in a single day, so the drops may be slightly unbalanced.
(After the second version, the datapack is no longer made in a single day.)

</details>
